Create Primary Clock.description: Define a primary clock for the synthesis and timing engine

Create Generated Clock.description: Define a generated/divided clock with explicit source pin

Set Async Clock Group.description: Declare two clocks as completely asynchronous (CDC)

Set Input Delay (Max/Min).description: Specify input delay to account for external Tco and PCB routing

Set Output Delay (Max/Min).description: Specify output delay to account for external Tsu/Th requirements

Set Multicycle Path (Setup & Hold).description: Relax timing for paths taking multiple cycles (remember to adjust hold!)

Set Max Delay Datapath Only (CDC).description: Limit datapath delay for async CDC, ignoring clock phase differences

Set False Path.description: Ignore timing analysis for specific paths (e.g., async resets)

Get Cells Hierarchical (Object Query).description: Query database for specific cell instances

Get Pins Best Practice (Object Query).description: Safely query pins by finding cells first (avoids global pin traversal hangs)

Set Property Package Pin.description: Map generic port to physical FPGA package pin

Set Property IO Standard.description: Set the I/O electrical standard for a port

Set Dont Touch (Anti-Optimization).description: Prevent synthesis/implementation from optimizing away logic

Set Mark Debug (ILA Probe).description: Preserve nets specifically for ILA debugging
